description: Only build if T-007 confirms Claude Code actually renders MCP progress notifications. Tool handlers accept an MCP progress callback and pass it to the Codex client. src/codex/client.ts emits "Reviewing chunk N of M..." heartbeats during chunked reviews and a simple "Reviewing..." heartbeat for single-chunk reviews. Falls back silently when the MCP client doesn't support progress. Acceptance: progress notifications emitted at the expected boundaries; no regression when client ignores them. If T-007 negative: close this ticket as "won't do" and reference the lesson.
title: MCP progress notifications (gated on T-007)
